3230030.name: Chaos of Destiny Remake
3230030.description:
Chaos of Destiny Remake is a turn-based RPG with a dark atmosphere where you must face the tyrannical Prisma Team and monsters born from the darkness.

Explore cities, villages, and dungeons, craft items through alchemy recipes, and uncover secrets hidden after the fall of the world.

Live a story filled with peculiar characters, formidable enemies, and a protagonist marked by a past the game itself tries to conceal.

Main Features:

⚔️ Classic turn-based combat with skills, magic, and strategies.

🧪 Recipe and alchemy system to make use of hundreds of items.

🌍 Exploration of a world in chaos, with cities protected by walls and places corrupted by darkness.

🎭 Unique characters like Catty or Kortana, who will surely make your experience memorable.

🕹️ More than 800 items, secrets, and fourth-wall-breaking events that are part of the experience.

🎵 A varied soundtrack with music from different composers.

🌟 Your choices will shape the story, affecting relationships with characters, events, and potential paths. Every decision can lead to unexpected consequences, making each playthrough a unique experience.

------------------------------

  • "Chaos of Destiny is designed to play with you."

  • "It’s not a glitch. It’s the game protecting itself from you."

  • "Monsters don’t always attack. Sometimes they just watch."

  • "Survive. But don’t trust reality."

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
